name: Chicken Salad Bowl
steps: Marinate chicken with chilli powder, pepper, lemon, and salt.
Air fry or pan cook at 180 C for 12 to 15 minutes.
Slice cucumber, carrot, tomato, capsicum, and onion.
Toss vegetables with lemon, pepper, and salt.
Plate the chicken with the salad.
Add fruit on the side and eat immediately.
tasks: Check if chicken is marinated from the night before.
Chop vegetables fresh before eating.
Add fruit last to keep it fresh.

name: Egg Salad Plate
steps: Boil eggs for 10 minutes or scramble them in a pan.
Slice cucumber, carrot, tomato, capsicum, and onion.
Toss vegetables with lemon, pepper, and salt.
Plate the eggs with the salad.
Add fruit on the side.
Eat immediately.
tasks: Boil eggs in advance if possible.
Chop vegetables fresh.
Add fruit just before eating.

name: Chicken Fried Rice
steps: Cook chicken in air fryer or pan and chop into small pieces.
Heat a pan and scramble the eggs, set aside.
Saute onion, carrot, and beans for 3 to 4 minutes.
Add cooked rice and mix well.
Add chicken and eggs back in.
Season with soy sauce, pepper, and salt.
Top with spring onion and serve.
tasks: Use leftover rice if available for better texture.
Cook chicken first so it is ready to mix in.
Keep heat high for a proper stir fry texture.

name: Paneer Rice Bowl
steps: Cut paneer into cubes.
Heat pan with a little oil and add cumin.
Add onion and capsicum, cook for 3 minutes.
Add tomato and spinach, cook for 2 minutes.
Add paneer and season with chilli powder and salt.
Cook for 4 to 5 minutes.
Serve over cooked rice.
tasks: Take paneer out of fridge 10 minutes early.
Reheat rice before plating.
Keep oil minimal to stay lean.

name: Egg Fried Rice
steps: Heat pan and scramble 2 eggs, set aside.
Saute onion, carrot, and beans for 3 minutes.
Add cooked rice and stir fry on high heat.
Push rice to side and crack in remaining 2 eggs.
Mix everything together.
Add soy sauce, pepper, and salt.
Top with spring onion and serve.
tasks: Use cold leftover rice for best texture.
Keep the heat high throughout.
Add curd on the side if protein is still low for the day.

name: Chicken Millet Bowl
steps: Cook millet with 2x water ratio for 15 to 18 minutes.
Cook marinated chicken in air fryer or pan.
Saute onion, tomato, spinach, and beans in a pan.
Season with turmeric, chilli powder, and salt.
Place millet in a bowl.
Top with chicken and vegetables.
Serve hot.
tasks: Cook millet in advance if possible.
Use pre-marinated chicken from the fridge.
Good high protein, high fibre dinner option.

name: Egg Millet Bowl
steps: Cook millet with 2x water ratio for 15 to 18 minutes.
Heat pan and saute onion, tomato, capsicum, and spinach.
Crack in eggs and scramble with vegetables.
Season with pepper and salt.
Place millet in bowl.
Top with egg and vegetable mix.
Serve immediately.
tasks: Cook millet in advance.
Scramble eggs fresh for dinner.
Add curd on the side if protein is low.

name: Emergency Chicken Curd Bowl
steps: Air fry or pan cook marinated chicken for 12 to 15 minutes.
Slice cucumber.
Mix curd with salt and pepper.
Plate chicken, curd, and cucumber together.
Add fruit on the side.
Eat immediately.
tasks: Use this on tired evenings instead of ordering.
Works best with pre-marinated chicken.
Add one scoop protein shake if daily target is not met.
